```
func setTagData(
```

```
func setTagData(
```

## [Overview](/documentation/FinderSync/FIFinderSyncController/setTagData(_:forItemWith:completion:)#Overview)

Concurrency Note

You can call this method from synchronous code using a completion handler, as shown on this page, or you can call it as an asynchronous method that has the following declaration:



```
func setTagData(_ tagData: Data?, forItemWith itemURL: URL) async -> Error

```

For information about concurrency and asynchronous code in Swift, see [Calling Objective-C APIs Asynchronously](/documentation/Swift/calling-objective-c-apis-asynchronously).
